title: How does it work?
subtitle: A simple process, on both sides.

candidateSteps.title: I create my profile
candidateSteps.description: 2 minutes, no CV. I describe my strengths, needs and expectations.

candidateSteps.title: I become visible
candidateSteps.description: My profile is visible to recruiters looking for my skills.

candidateSteps.title: AI assists me
candidateSteps.description: AI helps me be seen by the right recruiters.

candidateSteps.title: I get contacted
candidateSteps.description: No more unanswered applications. Recruiters come to me.

recruiterSteps.title: I simulate my pool
recruiterSteps.description: I discover available profiles in real time based on my criteria.

recruiterSteps.title: I discover profiles
recruiterSteps.description: Matching candidates are suggested to me.

recruiterSteps.title: AI assists me
recruiterSteps.description: AI analyzes profiles to help me make the right choices.

recruiterSteps.title: I contact and follow up
recruiterSteps.description: I connect with candidates and manage my recruitments.
